Home → Discography → Bone Brothers 2

Bone Brothers 2

2007 · Real Talk Entertainment

The second installment of the Bone Brothers series by Bizzy Bone and Layzie Bone. Released through Real Talk Entertainment, the album continues the duo's celebration of Cleveland street life, brotherhood and loyalty. Rather than new recordings, it consists of reworked material from earlier solo releases on the same label.

"They better remember that to the coldest winters pimp hand, Slippin ain't never an option, I get the trippin, Flip when they dip when they skippin."

— We Are Warriors
01 Bone Thugs-n-Harmony produced by Big Hollis ▷
02 Soldiers produced by Vince V ▷
03 One Day produced by Vince V ▷
04 Stackin That Paper produced by Big Hollis & Preach ▷
05 We Are Warriors produced by Big Hollis ▷
06 Straight to the Top produced by Sac ▷
07 Thugs Need Luv produced by Big Hollis ▷
08 Wake Up, Get Up produced by Big Hollis ▷
09 Walk Away produced by Sac ▷
10 Get It produced by Vince V ▷
11 Kick Back produced by Vince V ▷
12 Anything produced by Vince V ▷
13 Come n Up Big produced by Big Hollis ▷
14 Bone Thug 4 Life produced by Big Hollis ▷
